pages.text:
Reasoning
Q1
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions given below:
 
Point R is 12m north of point Q. Point U is 5m
west of V. Point V is 4m north of point S. Point X
is 9m south of point V. Point S is 7m east of point
R. Point X is 7m North of W.
 
How far is Point V with respect to Point W?
(A) 12m
(B) 9m
(C) 16m
(D) 10m
(E) 20m
Q2
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions given below:
 
Point R is 12m north of point Q. Point U is 5m
west of V. Point V is 4m north of point S. Point X
is 9m south of point V. Point S is 7m east of point
R. Point X is 7m North of W.
 
If Point A is the midpoint of RQ, what is the
shortest distance and direction of point A with
respect to Q?
(A) 6m, North
(B) 6m, South
(C) 16m, North
(D) 12m, South
(E) None of these
Q3
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions given below:
 
Point R is 12m north of point Q. Point U is 5m
west of V. Point V is 4m north of point S. Point X
is 9m south of point V. Point S is 7m east of point
R. Point X is 7m North of W.
 
What is the direction of point W with respect to
X?
(A) South
(B) Southeast
(C) West
(D) Northwest
(E) None of these
Q4
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions given below:
 
Point N is 10m east of point M. Point O is 15m
north of point N. Point P is 15m east of O. Point Q
is 15m north of point P. Point R is 15m west of
point Q. Point S is 5m South of point R.
 
Find the distance between N and S?
(A) 20m
(B) 25m
(C) 15m
(D) 35m
(E) 30m
Q5
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions given below:
 
Point N is 10m east of point M. Point O is 15m
north of point N. Point P is 15m east of O. Point Q
is 15m north of point P. Point R is 15m west of
point Q. Point S is 5m South of point R.
 
If a person facing north at Point N moves 90
degree clockwise and move 10m further to reach
Point Z then find the distance between Point Z
and Point M?
(A) 20m
(B) 15m
(C) 25m
(D) 35m
(E) 30m
Q6
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions given below:
 
Point N is 10m east of point M. Point O is 15m
north of point N. Point P is 15m east of O. Point Q
 
Direction Distance

is 15m north of point P. Point R is 15m west of
point Q. Point S is 5m South of point R.
 
Q is in Which direction with respect to Point O?
(A) Southeast
(B) Northwest
(C) Northeast
(D) West
(E) East
Q7
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions given below:
 
Point P is 20m to the south of Point Q. Point Q is
15m to the west of Point R. Point R is 40m to the
north of Point S. Point S is exactly between Points
A and B such that Points A, S and B form a
straight line of 30m.
 
How far and in which direction is Point R with
respect to Point S ?
(A) South-20m
(B) North-35m
(C) South-40m
(D) North-40m
(E) None of these
Q8
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions given below:
 
Point P is 20m to the south of Point Q. Point Q is
15m to the west of Point R. Point R is 40m to the
north of Point S. Point S is exactly between Points
A and B such that Points A, S and B form a
straight line of 30m.
 
What is the shortest distance between Point P
and Point R?
(A) 20m
(B) 25m
(C) 15m
(D) 30m
(E) None of these
Q9
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions given below:
 
Point T is 80 m towards the North of Point Q.
Point R is 30 m towards the West of Point T. Point
U is 40 m towards the South of Point R. Point S is
30 m towards the East of Point U. Point W is 30
towards the West of Point Q.
 
If a person walks 20 m towards East from Point U
and takes a right turn and walk 40m, which of
the following points he could reach first?
(A) W
(B) T
(C) Q
(D) U
(E) None of these
Q10
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions given below:
 
Point T is 80 m towards the North of Point Q.
Point R is 30 m towards the West of Point T. Point
U is 40 m towards the South of Point R. Point S is
30 m towards the East of Point U. Point W is 30
towards the West of Point Q.
 
Q is in which direction with respect to S?
(A) South
(B) North
(C) East
(D) West
(E) None of these
Q11
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions given below:
 
Point T is 80 m towards the North of Point Q.
Point R is 30 m towards the West of Point T. Point
U is 40 m towards the South of Point R. Point S is
30 m towards the East of Point U. Point W is 30
towards the West of Point Q.
 
Which of the following points can be joined by a
straight line?
(A) T, U, Q
(B) U, W, R
(C) T, R, W
(D) U, S, R
(E) None of these
Q12
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions given below:
 
Rohan is standing at Point O. He walks for 4m
towards east and reaches Point P. He takes a left
turn and walks for 2m to reach Point Q. He then

takes a right turn and walks 8m to reach Point R.
He again takes a right turn and walks 10m to
reach Point S.
 
From point S, Rohan walks 9m towards west to
reach Point A. In which direction from Point A and
for how many meter he needs to walk to reach 8
meter south of Point O.
(A) South - 5m
(B) West - 3m
(C) North - 4m
(D) South - 3m
(E) None of these
Q13
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions given below:
 
Rohan is standing at Point O. He walks for 4m
towards east and reaches Point P. He takes a left
turn and walks for 2m to reach Point Q. He then
takes a right turn and walks 8m to reach Point R.
He again takes a right turn and walks 10m to
reach Point S.
 
If Point Z is 4m to the west of Point Q, what is the
distance between Point O and Point Z ?
(A) 2m
(B) 3m
(C) 4m
(D) 5m
(E) None of these
Q14
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions given below:
 
Point A is 18m to the north of Point B. Point D is
west of point F. Point C is 20m to the west of
Point A. Point D is 15m to the south of point C.
Point E is exactly midway between Points D and F
in such a manner that Point D, E and F form a
horizontal straight line of 40m. Point G is 15m to
the north of Point F.
 
How far and in which direction is Point G from
Point A ?
(A) 18m towards North
(B) 20m towards East
(C) 15m towards North
(D) 40m towards West
(E) None of these
Q15
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions given below:
 
Point A is 18m to the north of Point B. Point D is
west of point F. Point C is 20m to the west of
Point A. Point D is 15m to the south of point C.
Point E is exactly midway between Points D and F
in such a manner that Point D, E and F form a
horizontal straight line of 40m. Point G is 15m to
the north of Point F.
 
In which of the following direction is Point B with
respect to Point C ?
(A) South-East
(B) South
(C) East
(D) South-West
(E) None of these
Q16
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions given below:
 
Point A is 18m to the north of Point B. Point D is
west of point F. Point C is 20m to the west of
Point A. Point D is 15m to the south of point C.
Point E is exactly midway between Points D and F
in such a manner that Point D, E and F form a
horizontal straight line of 40m. Point G is 15m to
the north of Point F.
 
What is the shortest distance between Point A
and Point D?
(A) 20m
(B) 30m
(C) 25m
(D) 15m
(E) None of these
Q17
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions given below:
 
Point A is 18m to the South of Point B. Point C is
20m to the East of Point A. Point D is 16m to the
South of point C. Point E is exactly midway
between Points D and C in such a manner that

Point D, E and C form a vertical line. Point G is
18m to the north of Point C.
 
Which of the following Points form a straight line?
(A) B, G, D
(B) A, C, G
(C) G, C, D
(D) B, C, D
(E) None of these
Q18
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions given below:
 
Point A is 18m to the South of Point B. Point C is
20m to the East of Point A. Point D is 16m to the
South of point C. Point E is exactly midway
between Points D and C in such a manner that
Point D, E and C form a vertical line. Point G is
18m to the north of Point C.
 
In which direction is Point G from Point A ?
(A) North
(B) South-East
(C) North-East
(D) South
(E) None of these
Q19
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions given below:
 
Point A is 18m to the South of Point B. Point C is
20m to the East of Point A. Point D is 16m to the
South of point C. Point E is exactly midway
between Points D and C in such a manner that
Point D, E and C form a vertical line. Point G is
18m to the north of Point C.
 
What is the distance between Point G and Point
D?
(A) 30m
(B) 34m
(C) 20m
(D) 18m
(E) None of these
Q20
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions given below:
 
Point A is 18 m to the south of Point B. Point B is
10 m to the east of Point C. Point C is 8 m to the
north of Point D. Point E is 6 m west of Point D.
Point F is 14 m south of Point E. Point G is 16 m
east of Point F.
 
What is the direction of G with respect of E?
(A) North-East
(B) South-East
(C) South-West
(D) Cannot be determined
(E) None of these
Q21
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions given below:
 
Point A is 18 m to the south of Point B. Point B is
10 m to the east of Point C. Point C is 8 m to the
north of Point D. Point E is 6 m west of Point D.
Point F is 14 m south of Point E. Point G is 16 m
east of Point F.
 
What is the shortest distance between Point E
and Point C?
(A) 20m
(B) 10m
(C) 25m
(D) 15m
(E) None of these
Q22
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions given below:
 
Point S1 is north of Point S2. Point S3 is north of
Point S4 and west of Point S5. Point S6 is east of
Point S1 and south of Point S5. Point S7 is west of
Point S2. Point S1 is south-west of Point S4 which
is north of Point S8. Point S8 is west of Point S6
but not exactly middle of Point S1 and S6. 
 
If the distance between S7 and S2 is 12km and
the distance between S1 and S2 is 5km then what
is the shortest distance between S7 and S1?
(A) 17km
(B) 16km
(C) 13km
(D) 8km
(E) None of these
Q23
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions given below:

Point S1 is north of Point S2. Point S3 is north of
Point S4 and west of Point S5. Point S6 is east of
Point S1 and south of Point S5. Point S7 is west of
Point S2. Point S1 is south-west of Point S4 which
is north of Point S8. Point S8 is west of Point S6
but not exactly middle of Point S1 and S6. 
 
Which of the following point is north-east of
Point S4?
(A) Point S6
(B) Point S7
(C) Point S5
(D) Point S1
(E) None of these
Q24
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions given below:
 
Sunil starts walking towards East from Point A.
He walks for 20m and then takes a left turn. He
then walks for 10m and again takes a left turn. He
reaches Point B after walking for 5m. He takes a
right turn, walk for 6m and reaches Point C. He
finally stops at Point D after walking for 8m to
the left of Point C.
 
How far is Point D from Point B ?
(A) 11m
(B) 7m
(C) 10m
(D) 18m
(E) None of these
Q25
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions given below:
 
Sunil starts walking towards East from Point A.
He walks for 20m and then takes a left turn. He
then walks for 10m and again takes a left turn. He
reaches Point B after walking for 5m. He takes a
right turn, walk for 6m and reaches Point C. He
finally stops at Point D after walking for 8m to
the left of Point C.
 
If, a person walks 7m North from Point A, takes a
right turn and stops after walking for 13m.Then,
in which direction is Point D with respect to his
final position ?
(A) North-West
(B) North-East
(C) South
(D) East
(E) None of these
Q26
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions given below:
 
Raman drove his car for 50 km to North from his
house. Then he turned right and drove 80km.
Again he turned left and drove for yet another
60km to reach Hospital. From Hospital he drove
his car for 60km to East. Then he turned left and
drove 50km. Again he turned left and drove
60km to reach his Office.
 
What is the shortest distance between his Office
from the Hospital?
(A) 60km
(B) 50km
(C) 70km
(D) 80km
(E) None of these
Q27
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions given below:
 
Raman drove his car for 50km due North from his
house. Then he turned right and drove 80km.
Again he turned left and drove for yet another
60km to reach Hospital. From Hospital he drove
his car for 60km due East. Then he turned left
and drove 50km. Again he turned left and drove
60km to reach his Office.
 
With respect to the hospital, What is the
direction of the Raman’s house?
(A) North-East
(B) North-West
(C) South
(D) South-West
(E) None of these
Q28
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions given below:
 
Point P is 30 m to the east of Point Q. Point R is
10 m to the south of Point P. Point S is 15 m to the
west of Point R. Point T is exactly in the middle of
the Points S and U. Points S, T and U lie in a

straight line. The length of the line STU is 20
meters. Point U is to the north Point S. Point V is
15 m to the east of Point U.
 
How far and in which direction is Point V from
Point P ?
(A) 10 m, North
(B) 15 m, South
(C) 10 m, East
(D) 15 m, West
(E) None of these
Q29
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions given below:
 
Point P is 30 m to the east of Point Q. Point R is
10 m to the south of Point P. Point S is 15 m to the
west of Point R. Point T is exactly in the middle of
the Points S and U. Points S, T and U lie in a
straight line. The length of the line STU is 20
meters. Point U is to the north Point S. Point V is
15 m to the east of Point U.
 
How far is Point Q from Point P ?
(A) 20m
(B) 25m
(C) 15m
(D) 30m
(E) None of these
Q30
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions given below:
 
Point P is 30 m to the east of Point Q. Point R is
10 m to the south of Point P. Point S is 15 m to the
west of Point R. Point T is exactly in the middle of
the Points S and U. Points S, T and U lie in a
straight line. The length of the line STU is 20
meters. Point U is to the north Point S. Point V is
15 m to the east of Point U.
 
If U is the middle Point of T and W than in which
direction is Point S from Point W ?
(A) North
(B) East
(C) South
(D) West
(E) None of these
